entries.definition:
have those who disbelieve not considered that the heavens
and the earth were a multi-layered mass and We split them?
entries.definition_english:
have those who disbelieve not considered that the heavens
and the earth were a multi-layered mass and We split them?

entries.definition:
r–j–ʾ to postpone, to delay, to cause to wait. Of this root, تُرْجِئ
turjiʾ (variant reading: تُرْجِي turjī) occurs twice and مُرْجَوْن
murjawn once.

تُرْجِئ turjiʾ (variant reading تُرْجِي turjī) [imperf. of v. IV أَرْجَى
ʾarjā, trans; variant reading of imper. أَرْجِ ʾarji] to put off, to delay,
to postpone (7:111) قَالُوا أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ they said, ‘Delay him and his
brother [for a while]’ (variant أَرْجِئْهُ).

مُرْجَوْن murjawn [pl. of pass. part. مُرْجًى murjā] one who is put
off, postponed (9:106) وَآخَرُونَ مُرْجَوْنَ لأَمْرِ اللَّهِ and others deferred
to God’s decree.
entries.definition_english:
r–j–ʾ to postpone, to delay, to cause to wait. Of this root, تُرْجِئ

to God’s decree.
